accountedVsCodeTopLevelTools.agent: Used by the pack for subagent delegation and handoffs.
accountedVsCodeTopLevelTools.browser: Used opportunistically for browser-backed verification when available.
accountedVsCodeTopLevelTools.execute: Used for targeted validation and project-native commands.
accountedVsCodeTopLevelTools.newWorkspace: Intentionally omitted. This pack improves existing-repo workflows rather than project scaffolding.
accountedVsCodeTopLevelTools.search: Used heavily for codebase discovery and focused context gathering.
accountedVsCodeTopLevelTools.selection: Intentionally omitted. This is primarily a user-attached context primitive rather than a persistent tool budget choice for custom agents.
accountedVsCodeTopLevelTools.todos: Intentionally omitted from most agents to avoid extra state noise; the pack relies on phase-based workflows instead.
accountedVsCodeTopLevelTools.vscode: Intentionally omitted. The pack stays repo-focused and avoids broad IDE mutation or extension-management behavior by default.
accountedVsCodeTopLevelTools.web: Used for documentation lookup and external verification.
